metadata.title: Demon Slayer: The Scarlet Bond
metadata.logline: A kind-hearted boy becomes a demon slayer to restore his sister's humanity and avenge his slaughtered family in a war against the progenitor of all demons.
metadata.author: AI

scenes.title: Tragedy in the Snow
scenes.summary: Tanjiro walks through the heavy snow after a day of selling charcoal in the village. As he approaches his home, he is hit by the overwhelming scent of blood. He finds his siblings and mother slaughtered outside and inside the cabin. Amidst the carnage, he finds Nezuko still warm. He desperately hoists her onto his back and runs toward the village, hoping to find a doctor to save her while the snow falls relentlessly.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air is freezing, biting through Tanjiro's thin haori as he nears the end of his long trek home.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold and somber narration

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] I'm almost there... I hope everyone is still awake. I managed to sell all the charcoal, so we can have a proper New Year's feast.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted but hopeful, forced optimism through heavy breathing
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [sniff] ...Wait. What is that?
main_dialogue.tone: Sudden confusion shifting into sharp alarm
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The scent of winter and woodsmoke is suddenly overwhelmed by something metallic and thick. The smell of blood.
main_dialogue.tone: Ominous and chilling

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: M-Mom?! Everyone?! Hanako! Takeo!
main_dialogue.tone: Panic-stricken and desperate
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: He rounds the corner of the house and collapses to his knees. The snow is no longer white; it is stained a horrific, steaming crimson.
main_dialogue.tone: Grave and tragic

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: No... No! Why? Who would do this?! God, please... why?!
main_dialogue.tone: High-pitched, soul-crushing grief and disbelief
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Among the bodies of his siblings and mother, he finds Nezuko. She is slumped over, her body shielding Rokuta.
main_dialogue.tone: Mournful

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko? Nezuko! You're... you're still warm! Your heart is still beating!
main_dialogue.tone: A frantic spark of hope amidst absolute despair
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sad and sympathetic expression, eyes softened, hand extended

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I have to get you to the village. I have to find a doctor! Just stay with me, Nezuko! Don't die!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and determined, voice cracking with tears
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting the straps of the wooden box on his back

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Run as fast as possible down the mountain.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: My lungs burn, but I can't stop! I won't let you die too!
branching_dialogue.tone: Fierce determination, breathing becoming a rhythmic grunt
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [low, guttural growl]
branching_dialogue.tone: Unnatural and pained vocalization
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Huddled down, hugging knees, looking scared and vulnerable

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Try to talk to her to keep her conscious.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Stay with me, Nezuko! Remember what Mom said? We're going to see the festival next year! Keep your eyes open!
branching_dialogue.tone: Desperate pleading, trying to sound encouraging through tears
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko's body twitches on his back, her breathing becoming ragged and strange.
branching_dialogue.tone: Foreboding

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: A narrow, treacherous trail winding down the steep mountain. The snow is falling so heavily it creates a white-out effect, with gnarled pine trees looming like ghosts in the mist.

content.initial_location_description: A modest wooden house on a snowy mountain ridge. The heavy gray sky hangs low, and thick snowflakes drift silently through the air. The path leading to the front door is obscured by fresh drifts.
content.initial_bgm: hollow whistling wind and soft melancholic piano

scenes.title: The Water Hashira
scenes.summary: Nezuko suddenly transforms into a demon and attacks Tanjiro while he carries her. Before he can react, Giyu Tomioka arrives to behead the new demon. Tanjiro throws himself between them, pleading for his sister's life and promising to find a cure. Giyu is initially dismissive until Nezuko defies her demonic instincts to protect Tanjiro from Giyu's blade. Moved by this unprecedented bond, Giyu spares her, places a bamboo muzzle on her, and tells Tanjiro to seek out Sakonji Urokodaki at Mt. Sagiri.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The wind howls, biting at Tanjiro's skin as he carries his unconscious sister through the mounting drifts.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold and desolate atmosphere.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko... hang on... just a little further... I'll get you to a doctor!
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted and desperate, voice cracking with every breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Suddenly, Nezuko's body contorts. A low, guttural growl vibrates from her throat as she snaps her eyes open—now a piercing, slit-pupil pink.
main_dialogue.tone: Terrifying and sudden transformation.

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Snarls and pounces]
main_dialogue.tone: Animalistic and predatory.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crouched on all fours, predatory gaze, ready to pounce

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko! What are you—?! Stop! It's me!
main_dialogue.tone: Panic-stricken and confused.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The blue glint of steel flashes through the falling snow, aiming directly for Nezuko's neck.
main_dialogue.tone: Sharp and lethal.

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Step back.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold, clinical, and devoid of emotion.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mid-draw of katana, intense focus, sharp blue eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Wait! Don't hurt her! She's my sister!
main_dialogue.tone: A frantic plea for mercy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Your sister is gone. That thing is a demon. If I don't kill it, it will kill you and then find its next meal.
main_dialogue.tone: Matter-of-fact and dismissive.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Stern gaze, sword pointed downwards, intimidating posture

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Crying] Please! I'll find a way to fix her! I'll find a cure! I won't let her hurt anyone!
main_dialogue.tone: Pure anguish and desperate resolve.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Don't give others a chance to kill you! Stop your pathetic groveling! If that were enough to change anything, your family wouldn't be dead!
main_dialogue.tone: Harsh and booming, a stern lecture delivered with iron authority.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Pointing forward with one finger, authoritative expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Giyu lunges to finish the job, but something impossible happens. Nezuko breaks free from Giyu's grasp and leaps in front of Tanjiro.
main_dialogue.tone: Shocking and defiant.

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Protective growl]
main_dialogue.tone: Fiercely protective and defiant.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined look, furrowed brows, standing tall and protective

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: She... she's protecting him? Despite her hunger?
main_dialogue.tone: Genuine shock hidden beneath a stoic mask.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised expression, eyes slightly widened, hand near sword

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Swear to protect her no matter what.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I swear on my life! I will never let her hurt a human, and I will find a way to save her!
branching_dialogue.tone: Immovable determination.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gripping the hilt of his Nichirin sword, determined glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: Very well. Let us see if your resolve holds.
branching_dialogue.tone: Solemn and testing.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Both hands resting on scabbard, eyes closed in thought

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask Giyu for help.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: You're strong... please, tell me what I must do! How can I save her?
branching_dialogue.tone: Humble and seeking guidance.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deep bow of respect, hands pressed to thighs

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: Strength is not given, boy. It is forged. But I will point the way.
branching_dialogue.tone: Calm and slightly softer.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking down at a student, calm and mentoring posture

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The blizzard has calmed slightly. The snow is disturbed by the footprints of the struggle. Giyu stands over the siblings, his shadow long against the white ground.

content.initial_location_description: A steep, winding mountain path blanketed in thick, pristine white snow. Tall, dark pine trees weighed down by frost line the edges. The air is thick with a heavy blizzard, blurring the horizon into a greyish-white haze.
content.initial_bgm: tense orchestral with high-pitched strings

scenes.title: The Master of Mt. Sagiri
scenes.summary: Tanjiro arrives at the foot of Mt. Sagiri with Nezuko hidden in a basket. He is intercepted by a masked man, Sakonji Urokodaki. Urokodaki tests Tanjiro's resolve by making him climb a trap-laden mountain in the thin air before dawn. Despite his exhaustion, Tanjiro succeeds through his sense of smell and sheer willpower. Urokodaki recognizes Tanjiro's potential and formally accepts him as a student.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] We're finally here, Nezuko. Mt. Sagiri. The air... it feels so heavy.
main_dialogue.tone: Determined but physically strained. The voice is thick with fatigue but carries a core of resolve.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting the straps of the wooden box on his back

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Out of the thick mountain mist, a figure emerges. A man wearing a bright red tengu mask and a blue kimono patterned with clouds stands silently, his presence as immovable as the mountain itself.
main_dialogue.tone: Stoic and observational.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Who... who are you? I'm looking for Sakonji Urokodaki! Giyu Tomioka sent me!
main_dialogue.tone: Startled and breathless, shouting slightly to be heard through the fog.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The masked man does not move. 'You are too weak,' he says, his voice a gravelly rumble behind the mask. 'If you cannot even handle the thin air at the base, you will never survive the peak.'
main_dialogue.tone: Harsh, blunt, and authoritative. A voice that demands respect and admits no weakness.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I can do it! I'll do whatever it takes to help Nezuko! Please, give me a chance!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate but burning with a fierce, underlying fire. High energy and pleading.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deep bow of respect, hands pressed to thighs

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The man turns and vanishes into the mist with impossible speed. 'Follow me. If you reach the summit before dawn, I will consider you.'
main_dialogue.tone: Cold and challenging.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Wait! Don't leave! [gasp] I have to keep up... I can't lose his scent!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and frantic, struggling against the lack of oxygen.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Rely on your sense of smell to detect the hidden traps.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [sniffing] I can smell it... the scent of fresh lacquer and sharpened iron... there's a trap right there!
branching_dialogue.tone: Highly focused and analytical. The 'Eureka' moment.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro leaps over a hidden tripwire just as a barrage of sharpened logs swings through the space he occupied a second ago.
branching_dialogue.tone: Tense and action-oriented.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [exhausted] I... I made it to the top... I'm still... breathing...
branching_dialogue.tone: Utterly drained but victorious. A quiet, raspy whisper.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The masked man stands by a small hut. He watches Tanjiro collapse at his feet. 'You have a keen nose, boy. And more importantly, you did not give up. I am Sakonji Urokodaki. Your training begins now.'
branching_dialogue.tone: Respectful and solemn. A slight softening of the previous harshness.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Push through with sheer physical speed and reflexes.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I just have to... be faster! I won't let some traps stop me!
branching_dialogue.tone: Aggressive and stubborn. Pushing his body past its limits.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro is battered by stones and nearly falls into a pit of bamboo spikes. He is bleeding and bruised, but his legs refuse to stop moving.
branching_dialogue.tone: Grim and visceral.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Is... that the hut? I... did it...
branching_dialogue.tone: Faint and wavering. The voice of someone on the verge of fainting.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Urokodaki catches the boy before he hits the ground. 'Your technique was reckless, but your spirit is iron. I will teach you the way of the sword.'
branching_dialogue.tone: Stern but acknowledging. The voice of a master impressed by grit.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The fog is even denser here. The ground is littered with leaves and hidden pits. Bamboo traps and swinging logs are visible through the haze, and the air is noticeably thinner.
A small, modest wooden hut perched on a ledge near the summit. A small garden and a training clearing are visible. The first rays of the morning sun are beginning to turn the sky a soft purple.
A small, modest wooden hut perched on a ledge near the summit. A small garden and a training clearing are visible. The first rays of the morning sun are beginning to turn the sky a soft purple.

content.initial_location_description: A dense, misty forest at the foot of a towering mountain. Dark pine trees loom like giants, and the air is thick with a cold, damp fog. The ground is uneven and covered in moss.
content.initial_bgm: mysterious and atmospheric with low woodwinds

scenes.title: The Path of Water
scenes.summary: Over the next two years, Tanjiro undergoes a grueling training regimen. He practices the ten forms of Water Breathing and learns to control his breath to maximize his physical strength. He spends his days dodging lethal traps and swinging his sword until his hands bleed. During this time, Nezuko remains in a deep, supernatural sleep, which Urokodaki believes is her way of recovering energy without consuming human flesh.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Time on Mt. Sagiri flows like a mountain stream—persistent, cold, and carving away the softness of the boy who first arrived here.
main_dialogue.tone: Stoic and timeless; like a legend being told by a fire.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] Hah... hah... the air... it's so thin today. It feels like... my lungs are being scraped by needles.
main_dialogue.tone: Strained and rasping; every word is a battle against the altitude.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: For two grueling years, Urokodaki’s training pushes Tanjiro to the brink. Every day begins with a descent through a forest of lethal traps.
main_dialogue.tone: Informative and grave.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I can smell them! The scent of thread... and old wood! There!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and focused; the 'Battle Shout' where the voice is projected from the core.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Water Breathing... First Form... Minamo Giri!
main_dialogue.tone: Sharp and piercing; a sudden release of built-up pressure.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Even when his hands bleed and his muscles scream for release, he does not stop. He cannot stop. Not while Nezuko remains trapped in her silent slumber.
main_dialogue.tone: Somber and empathetic.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Check on Nezuko's condition.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Inside the small hut at the foot of the mountain, Nezuko lies still. She has not opened her eyes for months, her body surviving on nothing but sleep.
branching_dialogue.tone: Quiet and reverent.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.tone: Silent; the sound of peaceful, rhythmic breathing.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting cross-legged, looking relaxed with closed eyes

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [whispering] Sleep well, Nezuko. Urokodaki-san says you're recovering your strength. I'll become a slayer... I'll find a way to turn you back. I promise.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and vowed; a low-pitched promise heavy with familial love.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking down in somber reflection, hand near his forehead scar

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Push through the final form training.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Total Concentration Breathing... expand the lungs... let the oxygen reach every cell in my blood!
branching_dialogue.tone: Intense and vibrating; you can hear the physical effort in his chest.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The repetitive swinging of the sword becomes a meditation. Thousands of strikes daily turn his sword into an extension of his own arm.
branching_dialogue.tone: Driven and rhythmic.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I will not break! Again! One more time!
branching_dialogue.tone: Gravely and fierce; the voice of a man who has conquered his own pain.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The interior of a modest wooden hut. Sunlight filters through a small window, illuminating dust motes. Nezuko lies on a futon in the corner, looking peaceful and still.

content.initial_location_name: Mt. Sagiri - The Death Trap Slopes
content.initial_location_description: A rugged mountainside shrouded in thick white mist. Sharp logs, jagged stones, and hidden pits are rigged as traps among the dense cedar trees. The air is visibly thin and biting cold.
content.initial_bgm: Rhythmic, driving percussion with a sense of urgency and traditional Japanese flutes

scenes.title: The Final Trial
scenes.summary: Urokodaki leads Tanjiro to a massive, moss-covered boulder and tells him he has nothing more to teach. He declares that Tanjiro can only proceed to the Final Selection if he manages to slice the stone in half with his katana. After months of mental and physical struggle, Tanjiro focuses his Water Breathing technique to its absolute limit. In a single, fluid strike, he successfully splits the massive boulder, proving he is ready to face the demons that took his family.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: For over a year, Tanjiro had endured the grueling training of the mountain. Today, his master brought him to this silent clearing for a final, impossible task.
main_dialogue.tone: Solemn and narratively heavy

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] This... this is the final trial? But... it's just a rock. A massive, solid rock!
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless and overwhelmed with disbelief
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Comically shocked, white circular eyes, jaw dropped

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The masked man's voice was cold and final: 'I have nothing more to teach you. Slice this boulder in half, and I will allow you to enter the Final Selection.'
main_dialogue.tone: A deep, echoing ultimatum of a master

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Slice a boulder...? My katana would shatter before the stone even chipped. [gulp]
main_dialogue.tone: Quietly terrified, internal monologue
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Thinking deeply, hand on chin, eyes closed

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Weeks turned into months. Tanjiro struck the stone every day until his hands bled and his blade felt like lead, but the moss-covered giant remained unyielding.
main_dialogue.tone: Somber, showing the passage of time

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [gasping] I can't... I can't give up. Nezuko is waiting. I have to be the one to save her!
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted but fueled by desperate love
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: In the stillness of the mountain air, Tanjiro closes his eyes. He stops trying to hit the rock. He starts trying to feel the flow of the water within his own breath.
main_dialogue.tone: Mystical and focused

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I see it... the opening thread. It's faint, but it's there. The scent of the strike!
main_dialogue.tone: Sharply focused, a moment of sudden enlightenment
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Total Concentration... Water Breathing...!
main_dialogue.tone: A low, vibrating growl of absolute power
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Strike with the flow of the river!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Fourth Form: Striking Tide!
branching_dialogue.tone: A fierce, echoing battle cry
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Combat stance, knees bent, hand on sword hilt ready to draw

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: A flash of blue light tears through the mist. The sound of steel meeting stone is not a clink, but a thunderous crack.
branching_dialogue.tone: Epic and climactic

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [panting] I... I did it. It's open. The way is finally open.
branching_dialogue.tone: Weak but profoundly relieved
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look
branching_dialogue.trigger_sfx: thud of two heavy stones falling

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Trust in the strength of your resolve!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I will not let my family's deaths be in vain! BREAK!!
branching_dialogue.tone: Emotionally charged and screaming
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The blade connects with such force that the mountain itself seems to tremble. The rope snaps, and the boulder cleaves in two clean halves.
branching_dialogue.tone: Powerful and definitive

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Wait for me, Nezuko. I'm coming for the one who did this to us.
branching_dialogue.tone: Coldly determined, a promise of vengeance
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gripping the hilt of his Nichirin sword, determined glare

content.initial_location_description: A dense, foggy forest clearing on the slope of Mt. Sagiri. In the center sits a massive, ancient boulder, taller than a man, covered in thick green moss and wrapped in a weathered shimenawa rope with paper talismans. The air is thick with mist and the smell of damp earth.
content.initial_bgm: Tense and atmospheric traditional Japanese strings

scenes.title: The Overwhelming Glow of Asakusa
scenes.summary: Tanjiro and Nezuko arrive in the bustling, brightly lit district of Asakusa. Tanjiro is visibly disoriented and overwhelmed by the modern architecture, the crowds, and the electric lights. While attempting to settle down for a bowl of udon at a street cart, he suddenly catches a scent he can never forget—the same scent left at his home the day his family was slaughtered. Dropping his bowl, he follows the trail through the dense crowd in a desperate pursuit.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The night air of Asakusa isn't filled with the scent of pine or snow, but with the heavy, electric hum of modern progress.
main_dialogue.tone: Descriptive and cinematic

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [stuttering] Is it always... this bright at night?! The buildings are so tall, they're scraping the stars!
main_dialogue.tone: Wide-eyed wonder and complete disorientation
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Comically shocked, white circular eyes, jaw dropped

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro clings to Nezuko's hand, feeling like a small fish tossed into a roaring ocean of people and artificial light.
main_dialogue.tone: Observational

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko, don't let go! This city is... it's dizzying. How can people live with all this noise?
main_dialogue.tone: Anxious and protective
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled hums]
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and curious
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Tilted head, curious expression, one hand touching the bamboo muzzle

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: They retreat to a small, quiet udon stall at the edge of the district, seeking a moment of respite from the crowd.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and grounding

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [exhaling] Let's just eat something and rest for a bit. Excuse me, sir! A bowl of Yamakake Udon, please.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted but trying to be polite
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sitting cross-legged, resting, gentle expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The vendor hands him a steaming bowl. But as the vapor rises, it brings a scent that freezes the blood in Tanjiro's veins.
main_dialogue.tone: Suddenly chilling and high-stakes

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: ...! [gasp] This scent... I know this smell. It's the one from my house!
main_dialogue.tone: Sudden, sharp realization bordering on terror
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The ceramic bowl slips from his hands, shattering on the ground. The udon is forgotten as his instincts take over.
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and intense

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko, stay here! I have to find him!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate and determined
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Push through the crowd recklessly

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro shoves past pedestrians, his eyes darting frantically as the scent grows thicker, more suffocating.
branching_dialogue.tone: Frantic and fast-paced

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [panting] Out of my way! He's here... he's right here!
branching_dialogue.tone: Increasingly panicked and aggressive
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Focus your senses to pinpoint him

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro closes his eyes for a split second, filtering out the smell of oil, perfume, and smoke to find that one rot-filled trail.
branching_dialogue.tone: Focused and methodical

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: There. Between the streetlamp and the carriage... I won't let you get away!
branching_dialogue.tone: Cold, sharp focus
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The center of the district, packed with people. In the middle of the crowd, a man in a black fedora and white suit stands with his back to the camera, radiating an aura of absolute coldness.

content.initial_location_description: A vibrant, bustling cityscape of early 20th century Tokyo at night. Towering Western-style brick buildings are illuminated by glowing electric streetlamps and colorful neon signs. Crowds of people in both traditional kimonos and modern suits fill the wide stone-paved streets. Steam rises from street-side food stalls.
content.initial_bgm: vibrant but overwhelming jazz-fused orchestral

scenes.title: A Demon in Human Skin
scenes.summary: Tanjiro pushes through the crowd and reaches out to grab the man carrying the scent. He is shocked to find Muzan Kibutsuji living as a seemingly normal human father with a human wife and daughter. Muzan maintains a calm, cold facade, feigning confusion. To create a distraction and avoid a public scene, Muzan subtly scratches a passing man's neck, injecting him with blood and instantly transforming him into a violent demon. The city street erupts into chaos as the new demon attacks his own wife.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] This scent... it's thick. It's the same smell from my house! It's right here in the middle of the city!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate and frantic, breathing heavily with urgency.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro pushes through the vibrant crowd of Asakusa, his eyes darting between the well-dressed pedestrians until they lock onto a man in a white suit and a black fedora.
main_dialogue.tone: Narrative and suspenseful.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I've got you! Stop!
main_dialogue.tone: Commanding and filled with righteous fury.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro reaches out and grabs the man's shoulder. The man turns around slowly, and Tanjiro's heart stops. In his arms, the man is carrying a small, human girl. A woman in a kimono walks beside him.
main_dialogue.tone: Ominous and shocking.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Is there something I can do for you? You seem to be in quite a hurry, young man.
main_dialogue.tone: Polite, calm, and unsettlingly mundane.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing a soft, deceptive smile, hand on his hat in a polite gesture.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [stammering] Wh-What? You... you're living here? As a human?
main_dialogue.tone: Utterly bewildered and horrified.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Do I know you? You're frightening my daughter. Please, let go of my sleeve.
main_dialogue.tone: Mildly concerned, hiding a lethal edge beneath a mask of civility.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Furrowing his brows in a fake display of human concern.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: As Muzan speaks, his hand brushes past a passing man. With a movement too fast for the human eye, his sharp fingernail draws a tiny scratch on the stranger's neck.
main_dialogue.tone: Chilling and clinical.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] Now, let us see how you handle this distraction.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold and murderous, intended only for Tanjiro's ears.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing in profile, head turned toward the viewer, eyes sharp and lethal.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The passing man suddenly collapses, his body contorting and muscles bulging unnaturally. Within seconds, he lets out a beastly roar and lunges at his own wife, his teeth elongating into fangs.
main_dialogue.tone: Violent and chaotic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Restrain the new demon!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Stop! Don't hurt her! I have to help them, even if it means letting him get away!
branching_dialogue.tone: Heroic and panicked, prioritizing lives over vengeance.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: [thought] Such a weak, emotional boy. You'll never reach me.
branching_dialogue.tone: Dismissive and arrogant.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Turning his back, looking over his shoulder with a murderous gaze.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Don't let Muzan escape!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Kibutsuji! You won't get away! I'll follow you to the ends of the earth!
branching_dialogue.tone: Furious and vengeful.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro tries to pursue, but the crowd screams as the new demon begins tearing into the screaming woman. The duty of a Demon Slayer wars with his hatred.
branching_dialogue.tone: Tense and agonizing.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

content.initial_location_description: A bustling Tokyo street at night, illuminated by bright electric lights and colorful shop signs. Crowds of people in traditional and western clothing fill the stone-paved road under a dark, moonlit sky.
content.initial_bgm: tense and driving rhythmic strings

scenes.title: The Illusion of the Enchantress
scenes.summary: Tanjiro chooses to restrain the newly turned demon rather than pursue Muzan, prioritizing the preservation of life. As the police arrive and struggle to handle the situation, Tamayo and Yushiro intervene. Tamayo uses her 'Scent of Illusory Blood: Visual Dream' technique to shroud the area in floral patterns, blinding the onlookers and calming the situation. She reveals herself as a demon who has broken free of Muzan's curse and offers Tanjiro and Nezuko a place of safety.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The man Muzan Kibutsuji scratched has transformed completely. He thrashes wildly, teeth bared, while Tanjiro desperately tries to restrain him without drawing his sword.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and descriptive.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Please, stop! I don't want to hurt you, but I can't let you hurt anyone else!
main_dialogue.tone: Strained and desperate, his voice cracking with the physical effort of restraint.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Police officers rush into the light, their whistles piercing the night air as they brandish batons, mistaking Tanjiro's struggle for a common brawl.
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and chaotic.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [shouting] Stay back! Please, get away from here! This situation is more dangerous than you realize!
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and protective, projecting his voice over the noise of the crowd.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Even though he has become a demon... you still use the word 'person' to describe him. And you are trying to save him.
main_dialogue.tone: Serene and deeply impressed. Her voice is like a calm breeze cutting through the chaos.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, hands folded in kimono sleeves, serene expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A woman of ethereal beauty steps from the shadows. She scratches her own arm, and as her blood spills, the air begins to shimmer with an impossible light.
main_dialogue.tone: Mystical and awe-struck.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Blood Demon Art: Visual Dream... Scent of Illusory Blood.
main_dialogue.tone: Measured and melodic. The 'Vocal Smile' is evident here; her tone is explicitly inviting and peaceful.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Speaking firmly, head held high, authoritative but kind

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: What is this? This scent... it's like a garden of flowers in full bloom. The police... they can't see anything!
main_dialogue.tone: Baffled and wonder-filled, his eyes searching the floral patterns manifesting in the air.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: I am a doctor. I wish to destroy that man, Kibutsuji, as much as you do. I have adjusted my own body to survive without harming humans.
main_dialogue.tone: Sincere and sorrowful, carrying the weight of centuries of regret.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: A demon... who wants to kill Kibutsuji? And you... you've broken his curse?
main_dialogue.tone: Shocked and hesitant, trying to process the impossibility of her statement.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Puzzled expression, tilting his head to the side

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: I have. Come with me, young Demon Slayer. You and your sister will be safe in my clinic. We have much to discuss regarding a potential cure.
main_dialogue.tone: Compelling and warm, offering a glimmer of hope in the dark night.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand, expression of concern and gentle comfort

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Trust her and follow.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I can smell that you aren't lying. Your scent is kind... and sad. Please, help us.
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and humble, bowing his head in gratitude.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deep bow of respect, hands pressed to thighs

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [muffled humming]
branching_dialogue.tone: Calm and agreeable, leaning toward Tamayo with trust.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing neutrally, hands folded in front, calm pink eyes

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask about the risk to Nezuko first.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: If I go with you... can you promise Nezuko will be safe? She's never tasted human blood.
branching_dialogue.tone: Protective and cautious, his hand instinctively reaching for Nezuko's shoulder.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: I promise. In fact, her unique condition is exactly why I wish to speak with you. She is a miracle.
branching_dialogue.tone: Awed and reassuring, her eyes softening as she looks at Nezuko.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The chaotic street is replaced by a dreamlike haze. Vibrant red and purple flower patterns swirl through the air like ink in water, obscuring the police and the crowd. The atmosphere is quiet, muffled, and heavy with the scent of blooming blossoms.

content.initial_location_description: A bustling Asakusa street at night, now thrown into chaos. The cobblestones are slick with spilled blood, and the warm glow of traditional lanterns creates long, flickering shadows against the wooden storefronts. A crowd of panicked onlookers gathers at the edge of the scene.
content.initial_bgm: tense and chaotic orchestral

scenes.title: A Proposal of Hope
scenes.summary: Yushiro leads Tanjiro and Nezuko through a magical barrier into a hidden house. Inside, Tamayo explains her medical research into demon physiology and her goal to find a cure for Nezuko's condition. She asks Tanjiro for two favors: to allow her to study Nezuko's blood and to retrieve blood samples from demons closely related to Muzan. The peaceful moment is shattered when Susamaru and Yahaba, two powerful demons acting as Muzan's assassins, track them down and launch a devastating attack on the house.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Passing through the illusory wall felt like stepping into a different world. The bustling streets of Asakusa vanished, replaced by a quiet, secluded manor.
main_dialogue.tone: mysterious and atmospheric

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: The scent... it's so different here. It's clean, like medicine and old paper. Even though she's a demon, there's no scent of blood.
main_dialogue.tone: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Welcome to my home, Tanjiro Kamado. Please, make yourselves comfortable. This house is protected by a blood demon art that keeps it hidden from the eyes of Kibutsuji.
main_dialogue.tone: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, hands folded in kimono sleeves, serene expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled hum]
main_dialogue.tone: Looking up with wide innocent eyes, hands by sides
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking up with wide innocent eyes, hands by sides

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: I have spent over two hundred years studying the physiology of our kind. My goal is simple, yet daunting: I wish to create a medicine that can turn a demon back into a human.
main_dialogue.tone: Speaking firmly, head held high, authoritative but kind
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Holding a glass vial of medicine, looking at it with intense focus

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: A medicine... to make Nezuko human again? You truly think it's possible?
main_dialogue.tone: Bright wide-eyed smile, looking directly at the viewer
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Bright wide-eyed smile, looking directly at the viewer

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: It is. But for that, I require your assistance. First, I must study Nezuko’s blood. She is a unique case, existing without consuming human flesh.
main_dialogue.tone: Finger to chin, looking away in deep thought or contemplation
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Finger to chin, looking away in deep thought or contemplation

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Second... I need blood samples from demons closely related to Muzan Kibutsuji. Specifically, the Twelve Kizuki. Their blood contains a higher concentration of his essence.
main_dialogue.tone: Darker expression, shadows over misty purple eyes, reflecting her demonic nature
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Darker expression, shadows over misty purple eyes, reflecting her demonic nature

choices_and_branches.choice_text: I'll do it! I'll get you those samples.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: If it means saving Nezuko and stopping Muzan, I'll face any demon you ask! Please, take whatever you need from us.
branching_dialogue.tone: Enthusiastic thumbs up, beaming smile
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Enthusiastic thumbs up, beaming smile

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: Your resolve is admirable, Tanjiro. Thank you. I promise to do everything in my power to—
branching_dialogue.tone: Closed eyes, smiling softly, radiating a calm aura
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Closed eyes, smiling softly, radiating a calm aura

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: [CRASH] A sudden, violent explosion of wood and plaster cuts her off. Temari balls smash through the walls, obliterating the serene atmosphere!
branching_dialogue.tone: tense and chaotic

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Will Nezuko be safe during this study?

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I want her to be human again more than anything, but... she's already been through so much. Will the blood extraction hurt her?
branching_dialogue.tone: Sad and sympathetic expression, eyes softened, hand extended
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sad and sympathetic expression, eyes softened, hand extended

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: I will be as gentle as possible. Her safety and well-being are paramount to my research.
branching_dialogue.tone: Reaching out a hand, expression of concern and gentle comfort
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand, expression of concern and gentle comfort

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: [THUD] The conversation is silenced by a massive impact. A projectile tears through the wall, narrowly missing Tanjiro!
branching_dialogue.tone: terrifying and sudden

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The serene clinic is now a scene of chaos. A wooden wall has been smashed inward by a heavy projectile. Dust and splinters fill the air, and the magical barrier outside has been shattered.
The serene clinic is now a scene of chaos. A wooden wall has been smashed inward by a heavy projectile. Dust and splinters fill the air, and the magical barrier outside has been shattered.

content.initial_location_description: A traditional Japanese house hidden behind an illusory wall. The interior is a serene clinic filled with the scent of medicinal herbs, antique scrolls, and soft lantern light. Wisteria patterns decorate some of the screens.
content.initial_bgm: mystical and serene traditional Japanese flute

scenes.title: Temari and Arrows
scenes.summary: A high-stakes battle begins in the courtyard. Susamaru uses her multiple arms to hurl explosive Temari balls with lethal force, while Yahaba uses invisible 'Koketsu Arrows' to manipulate the trajectory of everything in the field, including Tanjiro himself. Tanjiro struggles to adapt to the shifting vectors of Yahaba's attacks. Nezuko enters the fray to support him, showing increased physical strength and regeneration. Through teamwork and Tanjiro's strategic use of Water Breathing forms, they manage to sever Yahaba's head, though the demon's final spiteful attack nearly crushes Tanjiro.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air screams as multiple Temari balls tear through the atmosphere, their trajectories defying the laws of physics.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and fast-paced, emphasizing the supernatural danger.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] I can't track them with my eyes alone! The scent... it's twisting! It’s like the wind itself is being manipulated!
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and breathless; the actor should convey the physical strain of dodging heavy projectiles.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Combat stance, knees bent, hand on sword hilt ready to draw

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: From the shadows, Yahaba’s eyes—embedded in his palms—blink open. Red arrows manifest on Tanjiro's body, dragging him toward the stone floor.
main_dialogue.tone: Menacing and cold narration.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Ugh! My body... it's being pulled! I have to... I have to find the source of these arrows!
main_dialogue.tone: Strained and grunting, as if fighting against an invisible physical force.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled growl of intense focus]
main_dialogue.tone: Fierce and protective; a low, guttural sound through her bamboo muzzle.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive combat stance, lowered center of gravity, veins bulging on forehead, sharp slit pupils

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko launches herself into the air, her leg glowing with demonic strength. She kicks a Temari ball with enough force to send it whistling back at the darkness.
main_dialogue.tone: Action-oriented and impactful.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko! Thank you! I see them now... the vectors! I can use the Water Breathing to flow with the arrows instead of resisting them!
main_dialogue.tone: A sudden realization; the 'Aha!' moment. Voices shifts from panic to tactical clarity.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Total Concentration... Water Breathing, Tenth Form: Constant Flux!
main_dialogue.tone: Commanding and heroic, shouting the technique with maximum conviction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro becomes a blur of blue and white waves. He rides the momentum of the red arrows, spinning his blade in a cycle of increasing power.
main_dialogue.tone: Epic and climactic.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The blade connects. Yahaba's head is severed cleanly, but his eyes remain open, wide with a final, vengeful spite.
main_dialogue.tone: Dark and ominous, signaling that the threat isn't over.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Brace for the final impact!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: He's putting everything into this last attack! I can't let go of my sword!
branching_dialogue.tone: Desperate and gritty.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Dozens of arrows slam into Tanjiro's back, pinning him to the earth as the demon fades into dust. The ground cracks beneath him.
branching_dialogue.tone: Heavily dramatic.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Call out to Nezuko for help!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko! Look out! The arrows are... they're uncontrolled!
branching_dialogue.tone: Urgent and protective.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [muffled cry of concern]
branching_dialogue.tone: Panic and devotion in a single sound.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, jumping back slightly with hands raised in the air

content.initial_location_name: The Courtyard of the Hidden House
content.initial_location_description: A moonlit Japanese courtyard with shattered wooden floorboards and dust hanging in the air. The architecture of the hidden house is visible in the background, partially destroyed by explosive impact marks.
content.initial_bgm: tense orchestral combat with high-paced strings

scenes.title: Aftermath and New Paths
scenes.summary: With Yahaba gone, Tamayo uses a specialized drug to trick Susamaru into saying Muzan's name, triggering the Kibutsuji curse that destroys her from within. Tanjiro, though injured, collects the blood samples for Tamayo. Tamayo and Yushiro prepare to move their clinic to a new location to avoid further pursuit. Tanjiro and Nezuko share a final, respectful goodbye with their new allies, solidified by the hope that a cure for Nezuko is finally within reach as they prepare for their next mission.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The battle has reached its gruesome end. Yahaba is gone, but Susamaru remains, trapped within the intoxicating haze of Tamayo's Blood Demon Art.
main_dialogue.tone: Deep and evocative, setting a grim atmosphere with a low, resonant resonance.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: It is over. Tell me, little demon... what is the name of the man who turned you? Who is your master?
main_dialogue.tone: Hypnotic and smooth, with a chilling undercurrent of command that rings like a silver bell.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Darker expression, shadows over misty purple eyes, reflecting her demonic nature

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tricked by the scent, the girl screams out the forbidden name: 'Lord Kibutsuji!'
main_dialogue.tone: Sharp and sudden, mimicking the realization of a fatal mistake.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [gasp] What... what is happening to her? Her own body is...!
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless and horrified, with a shaky, high-pitched tremor of genuine shock.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Comically shocked, white circular eyes, jaw dropped

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: It is the Kibutsuji curse. He leaves no room for betrayal. Those who utter his name are destroyed from within by the very cells he gave them.
main_dialogue.tone: Sorrowful and heavy, the voice weighted by centuries of witnessing Muzan's cruelty.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking down, hand on chest, sorrowful and empathetic expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Even his own subordinates... he treats them like disposable tools. It's unforgivable.
main_dialogue.tone: Low and simmering with a quiet, burning indignation that feels like glowing embers.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking down in somber reflection, hand near his forehead scar

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro, please. The samples. Before the blood dries, we must collect what remains of these Twelve Kizuki aspirants.
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent but professional, the tone shifting to the clinical focus of a surgeon.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Speaking firmly, head held high, authoritative but kind

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro carefully extracts the blood from the remains. This is the first step toward a cure for Nezuko.
main_dialogue.tone: Reverent and hopeful, building toward a sense of hard-won progress.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: Kibutsuji's reach is long. Yushiro and I must move our clinic immediately to avoid further pursuit. Our time here is at an end.
main_dialogue.tone: Pragmatic and wary, with a subtle hint of regret for the short-lived sanctuary.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, hands folded in kimono sleeves, serene expression

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Thank Tamayo for her help.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Thank you for everything, Lady Tamayo. Without you, we wouldn't have survived this night.
branching_dialogue.tone: Earnest and overflowing with warmth, a bright and clear delivery that emphasizes his sincerity.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deep bow of respect, hands pressed to thighs

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: It is I who should thank you. You have given me hope that the cycle of blood can finally be broken.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and glowing, a 'Vocal Smile' where the warmth is audible in every syllable.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Promise to bring more blood samples.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I will find more of them. I'll get you the blood of the Twelve Kizuki, no matter what it takes!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and fierce, the voice ringing with a powerful, youthful resolve.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Adjusting the straps of the wooden box on his back

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
branching_dialogue.text: Be careful, Tanjiro. The path you walk is fraught with shadows far darker than these.
branching_dialogue.tone: Cautionary and maternal, a whispered warning that lingers in the air.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand, expression of concern and gentle comfort

mid_scene_location_changes.new_location_name: Front Gate of the Ruined Estate
mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The entrance to the hidden doctor's home, now visible as the concealment spells fade. The sun begins to peek over the horizon, casting a golden-orange glow over the path ahead.

content.initial_location_description: A traditional Japanese estate shattered by battle. Broken wood, torn paper doors, and cracked stone tiles are illuminated by the pale moonlight. The air is thick with the scent of blood and the lingering pink mist of Tamayo's blood demon art.
content.initial_bgm: Tense orchestral strings fading into a somber, melancholic melody

scenes.title: The Flame Hashira's Appetite
scenes.summary: Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke board the mysterious Mugen Train and locate the Flame Hashira, Kyojuro Rengoku, who is loudly enjoying multiple bento boxes. After the initial eccentric introduction, Rengoku explains their mission to investigate the disappearance of over forty passengers and several demon slayers. The group settles in as the train departs, unaware that Enmu has already set a trap via the conductor's ticket-punching ritual.

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: WOOOO-HOOOO! Look at this! We're inside the belly of the beast! It's even bigger on the inside than it is on the outside!
main_dialogue.tone: Wildly aggressive and boisterous; his voice is filled with animalistic excitement and a lack of social grace.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing loudly and aggressively

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Quiet down, you loud-mouthed pig! People are staring! And stop calling it a beast, it's just a train! [whimpering] Oh no, why is it so cramped? We're trapped in here!
main_dialogue.tone: High-pitched and frantic; the quintessential 'nervous wreck' voice with a sharp, comedic edge.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on head, mouth wide open in a panicked scream

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Now, now, Zenitsu. Let's focus on finding Rengoku-san. He should be in this car... [sniffing] Wait, I smell something delicious. And... very intense.
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and grounding; his voice is warm and sincere, acting as the anchor for the group's chaos.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: UMAI! UMAI! UMAI!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': booming, bright, and thunderously enthusiastic. Each word is a celebration of flavor.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eating, holding a bento box, eyes closed in delight, mouth open shouting Umai

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Uh... excuse me? Are you Kyojuro Rengoku-san, the Flame Hashira?
main_dialogue.tone: Polite and slightly hesitant; he is caught off guard by the sheer volume of the man.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Puzzled expression, tilting his head to the side

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: UMAI! [gulp] Yes! I am Kyojuro Rengoku! And you must be the boy with the box! Welcome to the Mugen Train!
main_dialogue.tone: Intensely friendly and direct; he speaks with a relentless, sun-like energy that leaves no room for doubt.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing straight, arms at sides, wide enthusiastic smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The group gathers around the Flame Hashira, who sits surrounded by a small mountain of empty bento boxes. Despite his eccentric arrival, his presence radiates a searing, protective aura.
main_dialogue.tone: Atmospheric and guiding.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Sit! Relax! But stay alert. This train has become a graveyard. Over forty people have vanished from this vessel, along with several of our own swordsmen who were sent to investigate!
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and grave, yet maintaining an unwavering confidence that inspires courage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Confident, arms crossed over chest, chin up, bold grin

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask how the demon is hiding.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Forty people... and you can't find a trace? How can a demon hide its scent so well on a moving train?
branching_dialogue.tone: Inquisitive and analytical; his voice carries the weight of a seasoned hunter.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Thinking deeply, hand on chin, eyes closed

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
branching_dialogue.text: A fair question! Demons are cunning! But no matter where it hides, my blade will find its neck! We shall protect every passenger on this train!
branching_dialogue.tone: Fiery and resolute; his voice swells with pride and martial spirit.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Reassure the terrified Zenitsu.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: It's alright, Zenitsu. We have a Hashira with us. We'll get through this together.
branching_dialogue.tone: Soft and comforting; the gentle tone of a big brother.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle laughter, eyes closed, hand partially covering mouth

branching_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
branching_dialogue.text: A Hashira? You mean this guy who just yells about food?! We're doomed! We're all going to be eaten by the train monster!
branching_dialogue.tone: Explosive and shrill; a comedic peak of pure terror.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying heavily with snot bubbles, clutching his yellow haori

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The view through the train windows darkens as the sun disappears, replaced by the blurred, ghostly shapes of trees rushing past in the moonlight.

content.initial_location_description: The interior of a luxurious Taisho-era steam train car featuring deep red velvet seats, polished dark wood paneling, and warm brass gaslight fixtures that cast a flickering golden light through the cabin as it vibrates with the rhythm of the tracks.
content.initial_bgm: energetic woodwinds with a rhythmic, train-like percussion

scenes.title: Dreams of What Was
scenes.summary: The demon slayers fall into a deep, supernatural slumber controlled by Enmu's Blood Demon Art. Tanjiro finds himself back in the mountains with his deceased family, experiencing a heart-wrenching vision of a life where the tragedy never occurred. Meanwhile, Enmu's human agents enter the dreams to locate and destroy the slayers' spiritual cores to kill them in the real world.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The rhythmic clatter of the train wheels against the tracks begins to distort, slowing down until it becomes the steady beat of a distant heart.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and immersive; the voice should feel like it's drifting away into a fog.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: rhythmic train tracks fading into a heartbeat

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: [muttering] Umai... Umai... tasty... [soft snoring]
main_dialogue.tone: Cheerful even in sleep, but muffled and distant.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing straight, arms at sides, wide enthusiastic smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko-chan... I'll protect you... the peach blossoms... [whimpering]
main_dialogue.tone: Whining and dreamily romantic, accompanied by a small sleep-mutter.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, head tilted down in a deep sleep, hand resting on sword hilt

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [gasping] Where... where did the train go? Why is it so cold?
main_dialogue.tone: Disoriented and shivering, breath hitching in the sudden chill.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: This smell... it's charcoal. And snow. It's... it's home?
main_dialogue.tone: Trembling with a mixture of disbelief and heartbreaking hope.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Onii-chan! You're back! Did you finish selling the charcoal?
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': Bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting, full of innocent familial love.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand enthusiastically, bright and cheerful eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko? You're... you're in the sun. You're human. I must be dreaming, but... it feels so real.
main_dialogue.tone: Choked up, voice cracking with suppressed sobs.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: What are you talking about, silly? Come inside, everyone is waiting for you. It's warm by the fire!
main_dialogue.tone: Gently teasing and warm, radiating a calm aura of domestic peace.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Leaning forward with hands behind her back, curious gaze

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: While Tanjiro is pulled into the warmth of the cabin, back on the train, shadows creep toward the sleeping slayers. Enmu's human agents prepare their ropes.
main_dialogue.tone: Dark and ominous, contrasting the warmth of the dream with the cold reality of the threat.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Step into the house and embrace the dream.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I... I just want to stay like this for a little while. Just a moment.
branching_dialogue.tone: Defeated by longing, a soft and weary whisper.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking down in somber reflection, hand near his forehead scar

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The warmth of the family hearth envelops him, masking the growing rot of the demon's trap as the agents find his spiritual core.
branching_dialogue.tone: Tragic and heavy, like a fading sunset.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Reject the vision and look for a way out.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: No... this isn't right! The smell is off. There's a demon here, hiding in the sweetness!
branching_dialogue.tone: Shouting with sudden, sharp clarity and mounting anger.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I'm sorry, Nezuko... but I have to wake up!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and fierce, despite the tears in his eyes.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Combat stance, knees bent, hand on sword hilt ready to draw

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: A breathtaking winter landscape in the mountains. Tall pines are heavy with snow under a soft, pale sun. In the distance, a small charcoal-burner's hut puffing white smoke looks incredibly inviting against the cold.

content.initial_location_description: The interior of a steam train carriage at night, dimly lit by flickering lamps. The air is thick with a strange, swirling violet mist. Passengers and demon slayers are slumped in their seats, eyes closed in an unnaturally deep, heavy sleep.
content.initial_bgm: A rhythmic, hypnotic ticking sound layered with a soft, ethereal humming and the distant sound of wind.

scenes.title: Severing the Nightmare
scenes.summary: Realizing the deception through his father's spiritual guidance, Tanjiro commits the desperate act of cutting his own neck within the dream to force himself awake. He confronts Enmu on the roof of the train. Enmu repeatedly attempts to put Tanjiro back to sleep, but Tanjiro's sheer willpower and repetitive self-sacrifice in the dream state allow him to remain conscious and resist the demon's influence.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The warmth of his family's presence feels so real, yet a sharp instinct pierces through the bliss. This snow... it doesn't smell of home. It smells of blood and incense.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and low, building realization.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] No... this isn't right. I'm on the train. We were fighting... I'm in a dream!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Realization': Starts shaky and uncertain, then sharpens into sudden, cold clarity.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking down in somber reflection, hand near his forehead scar

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The voice of his father resonates from the void: 'Tanjiro, you must wake up! Cut it! Cut what needs to be severed!'
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and ghostly, echoing with spiritual weight.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I understand now. To wake up from a dream within a dream... I have to die here. I have to take my own life!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Hardened Resolve': Firm, unwavering, and devoid of fear despite the horrific realization.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gripping the hilt of his Nichirin sword, determined glare

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Forgive me, everyone! I will see you again in the waking world!
main_dialogue.tone: Pained but resolute, a shout of absolute conviction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro swings his blade against his own neck. The world of snow shatters like glass, replaced by the roar of iron wheels and the freezing wind of reality.
main_dialogue.tone: Violent and sudden, marking a transition.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The top of the moving steam engine under a dark, starry sky. Thick black smoke billows from the funnel, and the wind whips violently across the metal surface.

content.initial_location_description: A hauntingly beautiful snowy forest at night. The air is thick with falling snow, and the moon casts a cold, pale light through the skeletal trees. It is a place of peaceful, yet suffocating, memories.
content.initial_bgm: ethereal and melancholic strings

scenes.title: Fusion and Counter-Attack
scenes.summary: Enmu reveals he has fused his body with the train itself, turning the entire vehicle into a demon. Rengoku, Zenitsu, and Inosuke wake up and begin defending the passengers from the flesh-tendrils consuming the cars. Tanjiro and Inosuke locate the demon's neck bone beneath the engine floor. Using a coordinated effort, Tanjiro unleashes a Hinokami Kagura strike to decapitate the train and end Enmu's life.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The very steel of the Mugen Train groans as it twists, the metal melding with biological matter. The demon has become the vehicle itself.
main_dialogue.tone: Deep, ominous, and cinematic; painting a picture of overwhelming scale.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] The scent... it's not coming from a single direction anymore. The entire train smells like a demon!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and strained; high-pitched with the realization of a nightmare.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: I should be ashamed! To think I fell into such a deep sleep that I allowed this to happen!
main_dialogue.tone: Booming and vibrant; even in a crisis, his voice carries an unwavering, fiery confidence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral, standing straight, arms at sides, wide enthusiastic smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Kamado, boy! Young Hashibira! You two search for the neck! The rest of us will protect the passengers in these five cars!
main_dialogue.tone: Commanding and authoritative; every word is a strike of a hammer on an anvil.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: I ALREADY FOUND IT! I CAN FEEL THE VIBRATIONS OF THE WEAK POINT BENEATH THE FLOOR! FOLLOW THE KING OF THE MOUNTAIN!
main_dialogue.tone: Aggressive and boastful; muffled slightly by his mask but bursting with raw energy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing loudly and aggressively

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Thunder Breathing, First Form... Thunderclap and Flash... Sixfold!
main_dialogue.tone: Whisper-quiet but deadly; the 'Vocal Sleep'—low, rhythmic, and devoid of his usual panic.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes closed, head tilted down in a deep sleep, hand resting on sword hilt

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled determined grunting]
main_dialogue.tone: Protective and fierce; though muffled by bamboo, the intensity of her resolve is clear.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined look, furrowed brows, standing tall and protective

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Coordinate with Inosuke to strike the engine floor.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Inosuke! We have to time this perfectly! If we don't cut through the bone in one go, he'll just regenerate!
branching_dialogue.tone: Strategic and focused; his voice is steady despite the chaos around them.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
branching_dialogue.text: DON'T TELL ME WHAT TO DO! BUT I'LL DO IT ANYWAY! BREATH OF THE BEAST, PIERCE!
branching_dialogue.tone: Wild and frenetic; shouting at the top of his lungs with competitive spirit.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, charging forward with swords at sides, steam puffing from nostrils

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Hinokami Kagura... Clear Blue Sky!
branching_dialogue.tone: A prayer-like intensity; the tone is transcendent, rising to a crescendo of pure willpower.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Rely on your sense of smell to lead the way.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I can see the thread! The opening is right there, beneath the thickest mass of flesh!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hyper-focused; the 'Zen' tone where everything else falls away except the target.
