branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
branching_dialogue.text: Move it, Monjiro! I'm the one who's going to tear this thing apart!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hot-blooded and impulsive; rushing headlong into the fray.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, crouching low, dual serrated swords drawn and crossed, intense combat stance

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Together, Inosuke! HINOKAMI KAGURA!
branching_dialogue.tone: Explosive and resolute; the finality of a hero's finishing blow.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The front of the train is a nightmare of organic architecture. A massive, white-calcified bone—the demon's neck—is exposed beneath a floor made of writhing, blood-soaked muscles.

content.initial_location_description: The interior of a steam-era passenger car is undergoing a horrific transformation; the floor and walls are being overtaken by pulsating, veiny masses of pink demon flesh and rows of blinking eyes.
content.initial_bgm: tense orchestral with heavy brass and a heartbeat rhythm

scenes.title: The Arrival of Akaza
scenes.summary: As the group recovers from the train's derailment, the atmosphere suddenly shifts. Akaza, Upper Moon Three, descends upon the site with overwhelming power. He ignores the injured boys and focuses on Rengoku, recognizing his immense strength. Akaza offers to turn Rengoku into a demon so they can perfect their combat skills through eternity, an offer Rengoku instantly and firmly rejects.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The dust from the crash begins to settle, but the silence that follows is not one of peace. It is the heavy, suffocating silence of a predator's arrival.
main_dialogue.tone: Deep, ominous, and foreboding

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] Rengoku-san... do you... do you feel that? The air... it suddenly feels so heavy.
main_dialogue.tone: Labored breathing, filled with growing dread and physical exhaustion
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A sudden shockwave tears through the clearing. In the blink of an eye, a figure stands before them, having descended from the sky with the force of a falling star.
main_dialogue.tone: Impactful and sharp

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Wh-who is that? The scent... it's overwhelming! It's like nothing I've ever smelled before!
main_dialogue.tone: Hysterical fear mixed with sudden realization
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The intruder is a demon with pink hair and skin etched with dark, intricate lines. He ignores the injured Tanjiro completely, his golden eyes fixed with terrifying intensity on the Flame Hashira.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold and analytical

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Upper Moon Three... I see. Your presence is as foul as your rank suggests. Why are you targeting a wounded man instead of me?
main_dialogue.tone: Steady, authoritative, and fiercely protective
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious, hand on katana hilt, sharp focused gaze, firm expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The demon, Akaza, smiles—a predatory, appreciative grin. 'I only have business with the strong,' he says. 'And you, Kyojuro... your fighting spirit is polished. It's magnificent. Close to the realm of the highest.'
main_dialogue.tone: Smooth, charismatic, yet chillingly inhuman

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Akaza extends a hand toward Rengoku, his voice dropping to a persuasive hum. 'Become a demon, Kyojuro. If you don't, your strength will wither with age. If you become a demon, you can train for a hundred, even two hundred years. You could reach perfection.'
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': tempting, inviting, and deceptively reasonable

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Growing old and dying is what gives meaning and beauty to the fleeting span of a human life. It is precisely because we age and die that our lives are noble and precious.
main_dialogue.tone: Resonant and unwavering, echoing with profound conviction
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Confident, arms crossed over chest, chin up, bold grin

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Strength is not a word used only in regards to the physical body. This boy is not weak. Do not insult him. I will say it once more: I will not become a demon!
main_dialogue.tone: Booming and resolute, cutting through the demon's aura
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle Stance, low crouch, hand gripping katana hilt, intense focused gaze

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Prepare to assist Rengoku

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [struggling] I won't let you fight him alone, Rengoku-san! Even if I'm like this... I have to help!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and strained, fighting through physical agony
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
branching_dialogue.text: Stay back, young Kamado! This is a different level of battle. Focus on your breathing and stay alive—that is your mission now!
branching_dialogue.tone: Commanding and urgent
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Protective, wide stance, arms spread slightly, fierce and determined gaze

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Observe the demon's reaction

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The air around Akaza turns frigid. His smile doesn't fade, but his eyes turn into narrow slits of disappointment and murderous intent.
branching_dialogue.tone: Cold and menacing

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: 'I see,' the demon whispers. 'Then I have no choice but to kill you before your talent goes to waste. What a shame, Kyojuro.'
branching_dialogue.tone: Melancholic yet bloodthirsty

content.initial_location_description: A desolate, smoke-filled clearing near the mangled wreckage of the Mugen Train. Trees are snapped like toothpicks, and the ground is scorched. Moonlight filters through the thick dust, casting long, eerie shadows over the debris. The air is thick with the scent of blood and burning metal.
content.initial_bgm: tense orchestral with high-pitched strings and heavy percussion

scenes.title: A Hashira's Final Stand
scenes.summary: A high-speed battle erupts between Rengoku and Akaza. Despite Rengoku's incredible Flame Breathing techniques, Akaza's regenerative abilities give him the upper hand. In a final, desperate surge of power, Rengoku uses his Esoteric Art to pin Akaza down as the sun begins to rise. Panicked by the sunlight, Akaza tears his own arms off to escape into the shadows, leaving a mortally wounded Rengoku behind.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air vibrates with the sheer force of the collision. Kyojuro Rengoku stands at the center of a crater, his breathing heavy and ragged.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and heavy with gravitas.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: [panting] I will... fulfill my duty! I will not allow anyone here to die!
main_dialogue.tone: Resolute and defiant, voice cracking slightly from exhaustion but filled with unwavering fire.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wounded, breathing heavily, slight blood on forehead, fierce smile through pain

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Before him, the Upper Moon Three, Akaza, laughs with a manic glee, his shattered ribs and torn flesh knitting back together in seconds.
main_dialogue.tone: Ominous and chilling.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Set your heart ablaze! Flame Breathing, Esoteric Art... Ninth Form: Rengoku!!
main_dialogue.tone: A thunderous, soul-shaking roar that echoes across the mountainside.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle Stance, low crouch, hand gripping katana hilt, intense focused gaze

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Kyojuro transforms into a literal dragon of flame, charging forward. Akaza meets him head-on, his fist plunging deep into Rengoku's chest even as the Hashira's blade carves into the demon's neck.
main_dialogue.tone: Visceral and tragic description of the impact.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: RENGOKU-SAN!! NO!!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate, throat-tearing scream of pure agony and helplessness.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Rengoku does not move. He grips Akaza's arms with superhuman strength, locking the demon in place as the first rays of sunlight crest the horizon.
main_dialogue.tone: Tense and expectant, the turning point of the struggle.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Akaza's eyes widen. Panic—pure, animalistic terror—overtakes him as the sun touches the treetops. He tries to pull away, but Rengoku's grip is a vice of iron.
main_dialogue.tone: Frantic and urgent.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: I... won't... let go!
main_dialogue.tone: Strained and guttural, every word a struggle against death.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wounded, breathing heavily, slight blood on forehead, fierce smile through pain

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: With a sickening sound of rending flesh, Akaza tears his own arms off, abandoning his limbs to Rengoku's grasp as he lunges into the safety of the dark woods.
main_dialogue.tone: Brutal and fast-paced.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: DON'T RUN AWAY, YOU COWARD! DON'T RUN AWAY!
main_dialogue.tone: Explosive rage mixed with sobbing grief, voice breaking under the weight of the injustice.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Run to Rengoku's side

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [sobbing] Rengoku-san! Please, hold on! I'll... I'll find a way to stop the bleeding!
branching_dialogue.tone: Panic-stricken and desperate, hands trembling as he reaches out.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

branching_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
branching_dialogue.text: Don't just stand there, Kentaro! Do something! He's... he's not moving!
branching_dialogue.tone: Angry to hide his absolute shock, his voice wobbling behind the mask.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Inosuke Hashibira_Neutral, standing

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
branching_dialogue.text: Don't... don't look like that, young Kamado. I have just a few more things to say.
branching_dialogue.tone: Peaceful and strangely calm, the 'vocal smile' returning as he accepts his end.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Proud, hand on chest, standing tall, beaming with a radiant smile

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Stare in stunned silence

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro falls to his knees, the weight of the moment crushing the breath from his lungs. The clearing is silent, save for the crackle of dying fires.
branching_dialogue.tone: Somber and hollow.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

branching_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
branching_dialogue.text: He won... he didn't let anyone die... but why does it feel like we lost?
branching_dialogue.tone: Quiet and hollow, the bravado completely gone.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, looking down, sad and quiet, hair covering part of the face after a defeat

branching_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
branching_dialogue.text: Come closer... both of you. There is no need to cry.
branching_dialogue.tone: Gentle and warm, like a father comforting his children.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Proud, hand on chest, standing tall, beaming with a radiant smile

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The clearing is now bathed in the brilliant, golden light of the rising sun. The light catches the falling embers and the blood-stained grass, creating a beautiful, tragic contrast with the violence of the battle.

content.initial_location_description: A scorched clearing in the forest near the mangled remains of the Mugen Train. Dust and smoke hang in the air, illuminated by the first faint, cool light of dawn breaking through the trees.
content.initial_bgm: High-stakes orchestral battle theme with frantic strings and booming brass

scenes.title: Legacy of the Flame
scenes.summary: As the sun rises, Rengoku uses his final moments to speak with Tanjiro. He provides leads regarding the Hinokami Kagura and leaves a moving message for his family and the young slayers, telling them to 'Set your heart ablaze.' Rengoku passes away with a smile after seeing a vision of his mother. Tanjiro, Zenitsu, and Inosuke are left devastated but resolved to honor his sacrifice by becoming stronger.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The sun begins to crest over the horizon, its light touching the devastation of the battle. The demon has fled, but the price of victory is written in the blood on the grass.
main_dialogue.tone: Solemn and heavy with a touch of cinematic grandeur.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Young Kamado... come closer. Let us have... one last talk.
main_dialogue.tone: Laborious but warm. You can hear the 'Vocal Smile' despite the physical agony; the tone is bright and inviting.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wounded, breathing heavily, slight blood on forehead, fierce smile through pain

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [sobbing] Rengoku-san! Please, don't try to speak! There must be a way to stop the bleeding!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate and cracking with grief. High-pitched with the strain of holding back a flood of tears.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: It is alright. My end is here. Listen... go to my family home. You may find records there... regarding the Hinokami Kagura. My father... he will know.
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and instructional. The voice is thinning but remains steady and focused.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious, hand on katana hilt, sharp focused gaze, firm expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Tell my brother, Senjuro... to follow his heart. And tell my father... to take care of his body.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft and affectionate. The 'Vocal Smile' is fully present here, conveying deep familial love.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Proud, hand on chest, standing tall, beaming with a radiant smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: And you... all of you. Believe in yourselves. No matter how weak or unworthy you feel... keep your heart burning. Grit your teeth and move forward.
main_dialogue.tone: Inspirational and powerful. A final surge of energy that rings out like a bell.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Set your heart ablaze!
main_dialogue.tone: The ultimate command. It is both a roar and a blessing.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Proud, hand on chest, standing tall, beaming with a radiant smile

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Rengoku's eyes drift toward the light. For a moment, he is no longer at the crash site. He sees a woman with kind eyes and a noble spirit standing before him.
main_dialogue.tone: Ethereal and peaceful.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] Mother... did I... did I do my duty? Did I use my strength well?
main_dialogue.tone: Childlike and hopeful. The voice is a soft breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Focused, kneeling in seiza position, hands on thighs, calm but intense expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Ah... I see. Thank you.
main_dialogue.tone: Pure joy. A final exhale of absolute contentment.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Laughter, head tilted back, eyes closed, mouth wide open in hearty laughter

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: With a final, radiant smile, the Flame Hashira's head falls still. The flame has gone out, leaving only the warmth of his legacy.
main_dialogue.tone: Quiet and final.

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: [wailing] No... no! Rengoku-san! Wake up! Please!
main_dialogue.tone: Hysterical and heartbroken. Unfiltered grief.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying heavily with snot bubbles, clutching his yellow haori

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: Don't... don't cry! He told us to be strong! We're training! We're going to get stronger!
main_dialogue.tone: Shaky and forced. You can hear the voice trembling behind the bravado.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, looking down, sad and quiet, hair covering part of the face after a defeat

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: He protected us... until the very end. We can't let his sacrifice be for nothing. We will move forward.
main_dialogue.tone: Somber but carrying a new, iron-clad resolve. The tone of a man who has grown years in a single night.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Vow to carry on his legacy.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I will never forget these words. I will set my heart ablaze, Rengoku-san. I promise!
branching_dialogue.tone: Fierce and swearing an oath.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Mourn the loss in silence.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro bows his head low, the weight of the Hashira's sword hilt cold in his hand. The silence of the dawn is his only answer.
branching_dialogue.tone: Introspective and quiet.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The sun has fully risen, bathing the scene in a brilliant, almost holy gold light. The shadows of the wreckage are long and the dust sparkles in the air.

content.initial_location_description: The wreckage of the Mugen Train lies scattered across the landscape. The dark blue of night is bleeding into a soft, golden-orange dawn. Smoke rises from the twisted metal, and the air is thick with dust and the smell of cooling iron.
content.initial_bgm: slow melancholic piano with swelling strings

scenes.title: The Hidden Hamlet
scenes.summary: Tanjiro arrives at the secretive Swordsmith Village seeking a replacement for his chipped blade. While settling in, he encounters the aloof Mist Hashira, Muichiro Tokito, and the bubbly Love Hashira, Mitsuri Kanroji. The atmosphere is peaceful as Tanjiro learns about the legendary swordsmiths' craft and the village's importance to the Demon Slayer Corps, unaware that their secret location has been compromised.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The journey was arduous, involving several blindfolded transfers and different guides to maintain total secrecy, but the air finally changes.
main_dialogue.tone: Omniscient and serene; the delivery is slow and melodic, emphasizing the hidden beauty of the location.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [sniff] The scent of iron... and sulphur from the hot springs. It's thick in the air. We've finally arrived, Nezuko.
main_dialogue.tone: Earnest and relieved; a bright, youthful energy that feels like a weight has been lifted.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled humming]
main_dialogue.tone: Curious and gentle; the sound is soft and inquisitive through her bamboo muzzle.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Peeking out from behind a corner, only eyes and hair visible

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro reaches back to check the hilt of his sword. After the brutal combat in the Entertainment District, the steel is notched and weary—just like its master.
main_dialogue.tone: Observant and grounded; a neutral narrative voice that highlights the physical toll of battle.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I hope Mr. Haganezuka isn't too furious about the state of this blade. I can already imagine him chasing me with a kitchen knife...
main_dialogue.tone: Nervous and contemplative; a slight tremor of comedic fear in the voice.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Thinking deeply, hand on chin, eyes closed

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: He will be. A swordsmith's pride is etched into the steel they forge. To chip it is to insult their soul.
main_dialogue.tone: Calm and monotonous; the tone is steady, like a still pond, carrying no hint of surprise.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, hands at sides, stoic expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Tomioka-san! I didn't know you were assigned to the village as well!
main_dialogue.tone: Genuinely surprised and welcoming; the voice rises in pitch with excitement.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: I am not assigned. I am here for a replacement. This place is the lifeblood of the Demon Slayer Corps. Without these smiths, we are just men with broken toys.
main_dialogue.tone: Direct and authoritative; a firm delivery that brook no argument.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Looking directly forward, eyebrows slightly furrowed, determined gaze

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: In the distance, Tanjiro catches a glimpse of the Love Hashira, Mitsuri Kanroji, laughing as she walks toward the springs, and the Mist Hashira, Muichiro Tokito, staring vacantly at the swirling mist.
main_dialogue.tone: Descriptive and wide; the voice expands to take in the presence of the other powerful warriors nearby.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: It feels so peaceful here. It's hard to believe we're still at war with Muzan's forces while a place like this exists.
main_dialogue.tone: Speaking calmly; a gentle and reflective tone that carries a hint of melancholy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Speaking calmly, one hand raised in a small gesture

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask Giyu about the village's secrecy.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: If the demons found this place, the Corps would fall within days. The secrecy is our strongest shield.
branching_dialogue.tone: Grim and realistic; a heavy tone that emphasizes the stakes.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens.
branching_dialogue.tone: Resolute and fiery; the 'Vocal Smile' replaced by sheer determination.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gripping the hilt of his Nichirin sword, determined glare

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Ask about the other Hashira present.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Kanroji-san and Tokito-san are here too... Is there a special meeting happening?
branching_dialogue.tone: Inquisitive and polite; the tone of a student asking a teacher.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Puzzled expression, tilting his head to the side

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: Coincidence, likely. Or perhaps the flow of fate is pulling us all toward a single point.
branching_dialogue.tone: Philosophical and detached; the voice trails off as if he is lost in thought.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Both hands resting on scabbard, eyes closed in thought

content.initial_location_description: A vibrant mountain village hidden by thick white mist. Rows of traditional wooden workshops line the stone paths, with steam billowing from natural hot springs in the background. Cherry blossoms drift through the air, and the rhythmic sound of hammers hitting steel echoes from the distance.
content.initial_bgm: Peaceful traditional Japanese strings with a soft, misty flute melody.

scenes.title: Sudden Onslaught
scenes.summary: The tranquility is shattered when Upper Moon Four, Hantengu, and Upper Moon Five, Gyokko, launch a surprise attack. Gyokko's grotesque vase-monsters terrorize the villagers while Hantengu infiltrates Tanjiro's room. A chaotic battle erupts; Muichiro is initially blown away by Hantengu's wind powers, leaving Tanjiro and Nezuko to face the regenerating and splitting forms of the Emotion Demons alone.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The quiet of the Swordsmith Village is absolute, the kind of stillness that precedes a great storm. But for those with sharpened senses, the air begins to thicken.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and low-pitched, setting a dread-filled atmosphere.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [sniffing] This scent... it's not like the others. It's thick, putrid... and it's right on the other side of that door!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and alarmed; the voice should catch slightly with the sudden realization of danger.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The sliding door creaks open with agonizing slowness. A pathetic, trembling figure crawls into the room—Upper Moon Four, Hantengu.
main_dialogue.tone: Chilling and descriptive.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko, get back! Don't let your guard down for even a second!
main_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and protective; a sharp command born from survival instinct.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gripping the hilt of his Nichirin sword, determined glare

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Mmmgh!
main_dialogue.tone: Muffled but fiercely determined; the sound of someone ready to fight to the death.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive combat stance, lowered center of gravity, veins bulging on forehead, sharp slit pupils

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: In a flash of blue, the Mist Hashira, Muichiro Tokito, strikes with blinding speed. He severs the demon's head, but instead of crumbling into ash, the body begins to convulse and split.
main_dialogue.tone: Fast-paced and intense.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: It didn't die?! It's splitting in two! Muichiro, watch out—!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate and panicked; a high-energy shout of warning.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: One of the new entities swings a leaf-shaped fan. A colossal gust of wind erupts, blowing the Mist Hashira out of the building and into the distant forest. Tanjiro and Nezuko are left alone as the ceiling collapses.
main_dialogue.tone: Chaos-filled and heavy with the sound of destruction.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: massive explosion of wind and wood snapping

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Protect Nezuko and focus on the angry demon (Sekido)

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko, stay behind me! This one with the staff... the air around him is crackling with electricity!
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and strategic; focused despite the overwhelming pressure.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The demon Sekido raises his staff. Lightning arcs across the tatami mats, forcing Tanjiro to move with desperate speed.
branching_dialogue.tone: Intense action narration.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Lunge at the carefree demon (Karaku) to stop the wind

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: If I can just take out the one with the fan, we can stop the building from being leveled! Nezuko, follow my lead!
branching_dialogue.tone: Brave and offensive; his voice is filled with the fire of battle.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro leaps through the debris, but Karaku only laughs, swinging his fan once more to create a localized vacuum.
branching_dialogue.tone: Menacing and fast-paced.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The once-orderly room is now a wreckage of splintered wood and torn mats. Dust hangs thick in the air under the moonlight, and the building is half-open to the night sky.

content.initial_location_description: A traditional tatami-matted guest room within the Swordsmith Village. Soft moonlight filters through the paper shoji doors, illuminating a peaceful interior that is about to be shattered.
content.initial_bgm: tense low-frequency suspense with occasional sharp violin notes

scenes.title: The Evolving Flame
scenes.summary: As Hantengu's manifestations—Sekido, Karaku, Aizetsu, and Urogi—overwhelm the heroes, Tanjiro realizes he must push his limits. Mitsuri Kanroji arrives to defend the village, showcasing her unique Love Breathing. Amidst the carnage, Tanjiro focuses his breathing, combining his traditional techniques with the Hinokami Kagura to refine his Sun Breathing, allowing him to cut through the hardened necks of the manifestations.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air vibrates with the screeching wind of Urogi and the crushing weight of Karaku's fans. The manifestations of Hantengu are everywhere, their coordination mechanical and lethal.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and cinematic with a hint of looming dread

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting heavily] My... my body... it's getting heavy. The vibration from those attacks is rattling my very bones.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted and strained, the voice thin and wavering from physical toll
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled growl of defiance]
main_dialogue.tone: Low-pitched, animalistic, and fiercely protective
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Aggressive combat stance, lowered center of gravity, veins bulging on forehead, sharp slit pupils

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Suddenly, a blur of pink and green streaks through the canopy. A ribbon-like blade dances through the air, parrying the manifestations' strikes with incredible speed.
main_dialogue.tone: Vibrant, rhythmic, and hopeful with an upbeat tempo

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The Love Hashira, Mitsuri Kanroji, has joined the fray. Her unique Love Breathing creates the opening Tanjiro desperately needs.
main_dialogue.tone: Grand and awe-inspiring, acknowledging a hero's arrival

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: She's... she's incredible! I can't let her fight alone. I have to find it... the interval of the thread!
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and inspired, voice rising with renewed purpose
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] Total Concentration Breathing... Sun Breathing. Hinokami Kagura. Combine the flow... become the flame.
main_dialogue.tone: Quiet, rhythmic, and intensely focused; the sound of air being pulled through the teeth
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Focus on extreme speed

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: The Hinokami Kagura... Clear Blue Sky! I have to be faster than their regeneration!
branching_dialogue.tone: Sharp, commanding, and swift
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro becomes a streak of fire, his blade refining into a thin line of solar heat that shears through the hardened necks of the manifestations.
branching_dialogue.tone: High-energy and triumphant

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Focus on explosive power

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: I'll pour every ounce of my soul into this one strike! Flame Dance!
branching_dialogue.tone: Deeply resonant and powerful, shouting from the core
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Combat stance, knees bent, hand on sword hilt ready to draw

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The air ignites. Tanjiro's blade grows heavy with the weight of the sun, crushing the manifestations' defenses and severing them with brute solar force.
branching_dialogue.tone: Weighted and impactful, emphasizing pure strength

content.initial_location_description: A dense forest illuminated by the chaotic glow of elemental attacks. Trees are splintered and the ground is scorched from the manifestations' relentless assault. Smoke and dust hang heavy in the air.
content.initial_bgm: Tense orchestral with heavy percussion and frantic violins

scenes.title: Dawn Approaches
scenes.summary: The fight reaches its climax as the sun begins to peek over the horizon. Tanjiro pursues the tiny, true body of Hantengu through the brush. He successfully decapitates the demon using a final, desperate Sun Breathing strike, but in his triumph, he realizes Nezuko is trapped in the open air as the first rays of sunlight hit her skin.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The scent of fear and old blood hangs heavy in the air. The true Hantengu, a pathetic, mouse-sized creature, scurries desperately through the undergrowth.
main_dialogue.tone: Gritty and immersive, building suspense through low-frequency narration.
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: brush rustling and rapid tiny footsteps

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: I can see you! You won't escape... not this time! [heavy breathing] I have to end this before the sun rises!
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and strained, voice cracking with exhaustion and resolve.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Total Concentration... Sun Breathing... Waltz!
main_dialogue.tone: A guttural, focused shout that resonates with power and spiritual focus.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A brilliant arc of crimson fire cuts through the darkness. The blade find its mark, severing the tiny neck of the demon in a single, blazing stroke.
main_dialogue.tone: Epic and triumphant, though laced with the weight of the finality.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] It's... it's finally over. He's crumbling away. We... we did it, Nezuko.
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted and relieved, the vocal chords sounding dry and worn out.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: But the relief is short-lived. As the demon vanishes, the canopy above thins out. The first direct rays of the sun pierce through the trees, striking the ground with golden heat.
main_dialogue.tone: Suddenly urgent and ominous, shifting from triumph to immediate dread.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: The sun? No... wait! Nezuko, get down!
main_dialogue.tone: Sudden, sharp terror. A high-pitched realization of immediate danger.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [muffled, pained crying]
main_dialogue.tone: Muffled by the bamboo, but clearly expressing agony and physical shock.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sad expression, furrowed brows, teary eyes looking downward

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Cover Nezuko with your body!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko! Stay behind me! I'll protect you, just hang on!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hysterical and fiercely protective, sobbing through the command.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro throws himself over his sister, his own body acting as a shield against the rising sun as her skin begins to smoke.
branching_dialogue.tone: Tragic and intense, focusing on the bond between the siblings.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Desperately search for the wooden box!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: The box! Where is it?! I have to get her inside right now!
branching_dialogue.tone: Frantic and disjointed, eyes scanning the area with wild desperation.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: He looks back to where the box fell during the struggle, but the distance is too great. The sun is rising faster than he can reach it.
branching_dialogue.tone: Hopeless and heavy, emphasizing the cruelty of the timing.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: A rocky, open plateau at the edge of the forest. The sun's golden rim is visible over the mountains, casting long shadows and illuminating the dust in the air. Nezuko is standing in a patch of direct light.

content.initial_location_description: A thick, claustrophobic thicket of tangled bushes and gnarled tree roots at the edge of the Swordsmith Village. The air is misty, and the sky is a deep indigo transitioning into a pale morning orange.
content.initial_bgm: Tense and cinematic orchestral with driving percussion

scenes.title: The Miracle of the Sun
scenes.summary: Tanjiro shields Nezuko with his body, weeping as he expects her to disintegrate. However, Nezuko pushes him away and stands up, her demonic features receding as she survives the sunlight. She utters her first words in years, greeting her brother in the morning light. The scene shifts to Muzan Kibutsuji, who senses this shift and declares that his search for the Blue Spider Lily is over, as Nezuko is now the key to his ultimate conquest.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Desperately] No! Nezuko! Shrink down! Get back into the box! The sun... it's already here!
main_dialogue.tone: Pure, raw panic. The voice cracks under the weight of impending loss.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare
main_dialogue.trigger_sfx: Rising wind and searing heat sound

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The golden light of dawn spills over the clearing, mercilessly illuminating everything it touches. Tanjiro braces for the smell of burning flesh, for the sound of his sister turning to ash.
main_dialogue.tone: Solemn and heavy with dread.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Sobbing] I'm sorry... I'm so sorry I couldn't protect you... I'm so—
main_dialogue.tone: Agonized weeping, thick with grief and exhaustion.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Suddenly, a small, firm hand pushes against Tanjiro's shoulder. He feels no smoke, no heat of combustion—only a gentle, steady warmth.
main_dialogue.tone: A shift toward awe and mystery.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko...? You're... you're not...
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless shock, transitioning from despair to disbelief.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised, eyes wide, mouth open in shock

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Good... morning.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft, melodic, and slightly hesitant, as if rediscovering the use of her vocal cords.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing neutrally, hands folded in front, calm pink eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Laughing through tears] You spoke... You're standing in the sun, and you spoke! Thank heavens... thank the heavens!
main_dialogue.tone: Radiant, overwhelming joy. Every syllable is a celebration of a miracle.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle laughter, eyes closed, hand partially covering mouth

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The bond between them transcends the laws of nature. But miles away, a dark presence feels the equilibrium of the world shatter.
main_dialogue.tone: Darkly cinematic and ominous.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Embrace the miracle.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: It has happened... Finally. After a thousand years of searching for that wretched flower...
branching_dialogue.tone: Whispered intensity, vibrating with a terrifying new purpose.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes widened in genuine shock, pupils shrinking to tiny points.
branching_dialogue.trigger_sfx: Dropping a glass vial, shattering sound

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: The Blue Spider Lily is irrelevant now. I don't need it. I only need to consume that girl.
branching_dialogue.tone: Cold, predatory hunger. The voice of a god seeing his ultimate conquest within reach.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Smirking cruelly, one hand touching his chin thoughtfully.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: An impossible, multidimensional space of shifting wooden hallways, upside-down stairs, and deep shadows lit by flickering lanterns.

content.initial_location_description: A grassy clearing at the edge of a forest, the horizon glowing with the intense, golden light of the rising sun. Dust motes dance in the air as the first rays hit the ground.
content.initial_bgm: Tense orchestral swell shifting into emotional piano

scenes.title: Collapse into Infinity
scenes.summary: The peace of the night is shattered as Muzan Kibutsuji launches a surprise assault on the Demon Slayer headquarters. Before the Hashira can coordinate a counter-attack, Nakime activates the Infinity Castle, pulling everyone into a gravity-defying dimension of endless rooms and shifting corridors. The Slayers are forcefully separated, scattered throughout the castle to face individual trials against the remaining Upper Moons.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The stillness of the night is not a sign of peace, but the held breath of a predator.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and low, setting a grim atmosphere.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [gasp] This scent... it's thick, like rotting flowers and old blood. Everyone, get back!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and panicked, with a sharp intake of breath.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sniffing the air intently, nose scrunched, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: So, the little sparks have gathered to be extinguished. How incredibly... tedious.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': You must hear the grin in the audio. The soft palate is always raised to keep the tone bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, cold expression, eyes fixed forward.

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Kibutsuji Muzan. You dare show yourself here?
main_dialogue.tone: Stoic and icy, controlled fury vibrating beneath the surface.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand resting on katana hilt, looking forward, serious expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: The Flame of Justice will not flicker in your presence, Demon King! We shall strike you down this very night!
main_dialogue.tone: Heroic, booming, and filled with unwavering conviction.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle Stance, low crouch, hand gripping katana hilt, intense focused gaze

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: NO NO NO NO! THAT'S HIM?! WE'RE DEAD! WE'RE ALL JUST SIDE DISHES NOW!
main_dialogue.tone: High-pitched, hysterical screeching.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hands on head, mouth wide open in a panicked scream

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: SHUT UP MONITSU! I'VE BEEN WAITING FOR A BIG FISH TO FRY! COME AT ME, PINSTRIPE PANTS!
main_dialogue.tone: Aggressive, gravelly, and overconfident.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Wearing boar mask, hands on hips, head tilted back, laughing loudly and aggressively

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Your bravado is as pathetic as your breathing techniques. Nakime... send them to their rooms.
main_dialogue.tone: Coldly bored, dismissive and sharp.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Smirking cruelly, one hand touching his chin thoughtfully.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: A single, sharp 'twang' of a biwa echoes through the air, and the ground beneath the Slayers simply... ceases to exist.
main_dialogue.tone: Dramatic and sudden.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Reach out for Giyu!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Giyu-san! Grab my hand!
branching_dialogue.tone: Desperate and straining.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined running pose, looking forward, hand on sword

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro! Don't let go! We have to—
branching_dialogue.tone: Urgent, losing his usual composure.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand to stop someone, urgent expression

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The shifting architecture of the Infinity Castle slams a sliding door between them, severing their grip.
branching_dialogue.tone: Tragic and final.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Protect Nezuko!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Nezuko! Stay close! I won't let them take you!
branching_dialogue.tone: Protective and fierce.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shielding someone, arms spread wide, protective glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [Muffled grunt of determination]
branching_dialogue.tone: Muffled but fiercely loyal.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clenching fists, eyes narrowed in a fierce glare

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: The gravity reverses, pulling Tanjiro upward while Nezuko is dragged into a side corridor by a shifting wall.
branching_dialogue.tone: Chaos and disorientation.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: An impossible, endless fortress. Thousands of wooden rooms, staircases that lead into the ceiling, and paper doors are arranged in a chaotic, non-Euclidean geometry that stretches into infinity.

content.initial_location_description: The serene Ubuyashiki Estate under a cold, full moon. The traditional wooden courtyard is bathed in silver light, but an unnatural, thick mist begins to roll across the pebble floor.
content.initial_bgm: tense orchestral building with a low drone

scenes.title: The Price of Victory
scenes.summary: Inside the shifting fortress, the Demon Slayers engage in high-stakes duels against the Upper Moon demons. Tanjiro and the Hashira push their bodies beyond their limits, suffering severe injuries and losses. Despite the overwhelming power of their foes, the Slayers' resolve remains unbroken, eventually leading to the defeat of the Upper Moons and the destruction of the castle's anchor, forcing the battlefield back to the surface.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air in the Infinity Castle is thick with the metallic tang of blood and the suffocating pressure of Upper Moon magic. The structure groans as it shifts, rooms rotating in a maddening dance.
main_dialogue.tone: Suspenseful and oppressive
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] It's... it's not over yet! We have to find the anchor! Giyu-san, can you still move?
main_dialogue.tone: Determined and breathless; his voice cracks with exhaustion but carries an iron will.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Don't worry about me. Focus on your breathing. If we lose our rhythm now, the castle will swallow us whole.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Stoic Mentor': Low, steady, and grounding, despite the visible strain in his posture.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Defensive swordsman stance, knees slightly bent, sword held horizontally

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: I'm gonna rip this place apart! My skin is tingling—the big boss is close! I can feel him!
main_dialogue.tone: Aggressive and wild; his voice is raspy and filled with adrenaline-fueled rage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, clenching teeth, determined expression, leaning on one serrated sword for support

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: [whispering] I can hear it... the sound of the castle's heart. It's right behind that wall...
main_dialogue.tone: Eerily calm and focused; the 'God of Thunder' persona has taken over, cold and precise.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Low crouching stance, hand gripping the gold-hilted Nichirin sword, serious aura

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: How tedious. You crawl through my domain like insects, leaving trails of blood as if they were symbols of hope. You are merely delays to the inevitable.
main_dialogue.tone: Utter disdain; a voice of absolute superiority that vibrates with hidden, murderous intent.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand extended forward, palm up, an expression of utter disdain.

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Set your heart ablaze, young Kamado! The dawn is coming, and no fortress of shadows can withstand the heat of a righteous soul!
main_dialogue.tone: Boisterous and inspiring; his voice acts as a beacon of warmth and unyielding courage.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Everyone... lend me your strength for one last strike! Hinokami Kagura!
main_dialogue.tone: Fierce and resolute; a battle cry that channels the spirits of all his fallen comrades.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Aim for the Central Pillar!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: If we break the main support, the whole castle will collapse! HAAAAA!
branching_dialogue.tone: Explosive and desperate effort.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [muffled shout of encouragement]
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and fierce.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Determined look, furrowed brows, standing tall and protective

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Protect the Wounded!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: I'll hold the line! Tanjiro, take the opening now!
branching_dialogue.tone: Urgent and self-sacrificing.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mid-draw of katana, intense focus, sharp blue eyes

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Using the Hashira's defense as a shield, Tanjiro finds the narrow path to the anchor.
branching_dialogue.tone: Narrative climax.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The debris of the Infinity Castle erupts from the ground into the cool night air. The moon hangs low over a destroyed city block, smoke rising from the craters.
With a deafening roar of wood and stone, the Slayers are catapulted out of the collapsing dimension, landing hard on the cold, moonlit streets of the city.

content.initial_location_description: A dizzying, impossible architecture of wooden rooms, sliding shoji doors, and staircases defying gravity, floating in a dark, endless void. Blood spatters the tatami mats, and the air is thick with the scent of ozone and demons.
content.initial_bgm: Intense cinematic orchestral with heavy drums and choir

scenes.title: The Count Down to Sunrise
scenes.summary: The battle spills onto the city streets as the sun begins to approach the horizon. Muzan, now a massive and grotesque form, fights with primal ferocity while being hindered by the multiple poisons Tamayo successfully administered. Tanjiro and the surviving Hashira form a desperate circle around the Demon King, using every ounce of their remaining strength to pin him down and prevent his escape into the shadows as the first light of dawn appears.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air is thick with the scent of blood and ozone. The night is dying, and the King of Demons knows it.
main_dialogue.tone: Grave and cinematic narration

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Curse you... Tamayo... What have you put inside me?! My cells... they are destroying themselves!
main_dialogue.tone: Raspy, choked with rage and physiological agony
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teeth bared in a vicious snarl, eyes wide with uncontrollable rage.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [panting] We won't let you... get away this time! Everyone, stay focused! The sun is almost here!
main_dialogue.tone: Exhausted but fiercely determined, voice cracking with effort
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Don't stop moving. If we lose our grip for even a second, he'll burrow into the ground.
main_dialogue.tone: Cold, professional, but clearly at the limit of physical endurance
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Defensive swordsman stance, knees slightly bent, sword held horizontally

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: GRAAAAAH! I don't care how big you get, you overstuffed caterpillar! I'm gonna mince you into snacks!
main_dialogue.tone: Boisterous and defiant, masking intense pain
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, clenching teeth, determined expression, leaning on one serrated sword for support

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Just... a little longer... We have to hold him... we have to...
main_dialogue.tone: Low, focused, vibrating with the intensity of God Speed
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Low crouching stance, hand gripping the gold-hilted Nichirin sword, serious aura

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: BEGONE, YOU INSIGNIFICANT PESTS!
main_dialogue.tone: A deafening, inhuman roar of pure desperation
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting with mouth wide open, hand reaching out to grasp or crush.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Drive your blade into his central mass!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Hinokami Kagura... Burning Bone, Summer Sun!
branching_dialogue.tone: Maximum effort, a warrior's final scream
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Serious concentration, eyes focused, sword drawn and held low

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: Agh! The sun... the sun is already burning me through your blade!
branching_dialogue.tone: Panic-stricken, high-pitched shrieking
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes widened in genuine shock, pupils shrinking to tiny points.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Signal the others to pin his limbs down!

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Giyu-san! Inosuke! Now! Pin him against the wall!
branching_dialogue.tone: Authoritative and urgent
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: Understood. Eleventh Form: Dead Calm!
branching_dialogue.tone: Stoic and decisive
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mid-draw of katana, intense focus, sharp blue eyes

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: Let go! Let go of me, you filthy humans!
branching_dialogue.tone: Hysterical and terrified
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Clenching his fist tightly, body trembling with suppressed fury.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: The sun's corona begins to peek over the distant buildings. A brilliant, harsh gold light starts to wash over the street, turning the dust into sparkling embers.

content.initial_location_description: A wide Tokyo boulevard devastated by combat. Shattered cobblestones, overturned carts, and crumbling brick buildings line the path. The sky in the east is turning a deep violet and pale orange as the sun approaches the horizon, casting long, dramatic shadows.
content.initial_bgm: High-stakes orchestral with frantic strings and a ticking clock motif

scenes.title: The New Threat
scenes.summary: Muzan is vaporized by the rising sun, but he manages to inject his entire consciousness and blood into Tanjiro at the moment of his death. Tanjiro undergoes a horrific transformation, becoming the new Demon King. Unlike Muzan, Tanjiro is immediately immune to sunlight. He loses control of his senses and begins to lash out at his exhausted friends, posing a threat even greater than the one they just defeated.

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: [Desperate gasping] This... this cannot be the end! After a thousand years... the sun... it burns!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vicious Snarl': Raspy, desperate, and filled with a frantic terror that cracks the usual aristocratic composure.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Teeth bared in a vicious snarl, eyes wide with uncontrollable rage.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The Demon King’s body begins to flake away like burnt paper, the morning light unforgiving. But in his final moment, his eyes lock onto the broken boy before him.
main_dialogue.tone: Solemn and heavy, like a funeral bell.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro Kamado... you will be the one. My dream... my immortality... I entrust it all to you! Take my blood!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Malicious Legacy': A sudden shift to a high-pitched, frenzied obsession, dripping with dark triumph.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Hand extended forward, palm up, an expression of utter disdain.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Agonized scream] GAAAAAAHHHH! My head... it feels like it's exploding!
main_dialogue.tone: Pure, unadulterated agony; the sound of a voice being torn apart from the inside.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Tanjiro! Muzan is gone, but... what is this pressure? Why aren't you disintegrating in the sun?!
main_dialogue.tone: Sharp and panicked; the stoic mask completely shattered by a new, impossible horror.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Surprised expression, eyes slightly widened, hand near sword

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: [Sobbing] No... no, no, no! The sound coming from him... it's not Tanjiro anymore! It's something... monstrous!
main_dialogue.tone: Comedic terror turned into genuine, high-pitched weeping; a sound of absolute despair.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Jumping back in shock, eyes widened and pupils shrunk

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: Hey, Kentaro! Stop it! The fight is over! Stop making that creepy face!
main_dialogue.tone: Brash and loud, but with a noticeable tremor of uncertainty and fear behind the bravado.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, clenching teeth, determined expression, leaning on one serrated sword for support

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [Deep, guttural growl] ...Hungry... So... hungry...
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Demon King': Hollow, distorted, and devoid of any human warmth. The pitch is lower, echoing with a supernatural resonance.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting angrily, brows furrowed, pointing forward

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The sun is fully up now. The rays hit Tanjiro's skin, but instead of burning, he stands tall. A new mark spreads across his face, and his pupils narrow into lethal slits.
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Chilling Realization': Cold and clinical, marking the birth of a disaster.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Narrator

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Giyu: 'Everyone, get back! I'll handle this!'

branching_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
branching_dialogue.text: He's become a demon... and he's conquered the sun. If we don't stop him now, humanity is finished!
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Grim Executioner': Steely, cold, and heavy with the weight of a duty he never wanted.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mid-draw of katana, intense focus, sharp blue eyes

branching_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [Muffled cry] Mmmph! Mmmph!
branching_dialogue.tone: Desperate and pleading, her voice vibrating behind the bamboo.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand toward the viewer, pleading expression

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Zenitsu: 'Tanjiro, please! Come back to us!'

branching_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
branching_dialogue.text: Tanjiro! You're the kindest person I know! Don't let that monster win! Fight it!
branching_dialogue.tone: The 'Pathetic Plea': Cracking with emotion, raw and begging for a miracle.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Kneeling on the ground, hands outstretched in a begging gesture, tearful eyes

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: [Feral roar] ROOOOOAAAAR!
branching_dialogue.tone: Animalistic and violent; no traces of the boy remain.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Combat stance, knees bent, hand on sword hilt ready to draw

content.initial_location_name: Tokyo City Streets - Dawn of the Final Battle
content.initial_location_description: The ruined streets of Tokyo at the crack of dawn. Debris and shattered wood litter the cobblestones. The first rays of gold sunlight pierce through the thick smoke and dust of the battle, casting long, dramatic shadows over the exhausted demon slayers.
content.initial_bgm: Tense orchestral with high-pitched strings and a rhythmic, pounding heartbeat

scenes.title: Bonds of Humanity
scenes.summary: Nezuko reaches the battlefield and embraces her brother, pleading for him to return to her. Seizing a narrow opening, Kanao uses her final Breath technique to deliver the last remaining dose of the demon-to-human medicine. Inside a spiritual void, Tanjiro battles Muzan's lingering ghost, supported by the hands of his fallen comrades. He successfully rejects the demon blood and reverts to human form, finally ending the era of demons.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: The air is heavy with the scent of iron and despair. Tanjiro, now a mindless vessel for Muzan's remaining essence, snarls at the survivors.
main_dialogue.tone: Somber and weighted with gravity

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Onii-chan! Please, stop! Don't let him take you away!
main_dialogue.tone: Desperate, cracking with emotion and tearful plea
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Running with short quick steps, arms flailing slightly in a small form

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko, stay back! He isn't himself anymore!
main_dialogue.tone: Urgent and strained, heavy with exhaustion
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Reaching out a hand to stop someone, urgent expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: [sobbing] I don't care! I'm not leaving him! We're going home together!
main_dialogue.tone: Fierce determination through thick tears
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Sad expression, furrowed brows, teary eyes looking downward

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Nezuko throws her arms around the monstrous Tanjiro. In the chaos, a flicker of purple movement catches Giyu's eye—Kanao leaps forward with a syringe.
main_dialogue.tone: Breathless and cinematic

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: GAAAHHHH! [struggling]
main_dialogue.tone: Agonized, animalistic scream
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Exhausted and panting, leaning forward, sweat on his face

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: As the medicine enters his blood, Tanjiro's consciousness is plunged into a blinding white abyss.
main_dialogue.tone: Ethereal and transitioning

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Do not resist, Tanjiro! You are my successor! You will inherit my immortality and conquer the sun!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': Manipulative, bright, and explicitly inviting yet poisonous
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Fingers steepled in front of his face, a dark, manipulative smile.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: No... I don't want this... I want to be human! I want to go back to my friends!
main_dialogue.tone: Strained and pained, but growing in resolve
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Crying with a pained expression, hand clutching his chest

main_dialogue.speaker: Kyojuro Rengoku
main_dialogue.text: Set your heart ablaze, young Kamado! Do not let the darkness extinguish your soul!
main_dialogue.tone: Booming, enthusiastic, and filled with unwavering strength
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Action, pointing forward with determination, eyes wide and fiery, shouting

main_dialogue.speaker: Tamayo
main_dialogue.text: The medicine is working, Tanjiro. Reach for the hands that love you.
main_dialogue.tone: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Gentle smile, head tilted slightly, hands tucked in sleeves

main_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
main_dialogue.text: Silence! You are mine! You will stay here in the darkness forever!
main_dialogue.tone: Teeth bared in a vicious snarl, eyes wide with uncontrollable rage
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Shouting with mouth wide open, hand reaching out to grasp or crush.

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Reject Muzan's blood and reach for Nezuko.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Muzan... you're wrong. I'm not alone! Everyone is helping me!
branching_dialogue.tone: Powerful, resolute, and surging with hope
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Battle-damaged, clothes torn, fierce and resolute look

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: Dozens of hands—the spirits of the fallen Hashira and his family—push Tanjiro upward, away from Muzan's grasping claws.
branching_dialogue.tone: Triumphant and emotional

branching_dialogue.speaker: Muzan Kibutsuji
branching_dialogue.text: NO! WAIT! DON'T LEAVE ME HERE ALONE! TANJIROOO!
branching_dialogue.tone: Desperate, shrinking, and full of genuine terror
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Eyes widened in genuine shock, pupils shrinking to tiny points.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: An endless, shimmering white expanse where reality feels fluid, occasionally rippling with the memories of those who have passed.

content.initial_location_description: The aftermath of the final battle in Tokyo, buildings reduced to skeletal remains, dawn's first light breaking through a haze of dust and blood-mist.
content.initial_bgm: tense orchestral with mournful strings

scenes.title: A World Without Shadows
scenes.summary: The Demon Slayer Corps holds its final meeting and officially disbands, having achieved their thousand-year goal. The narrative shifts forward in time to a vibrant, modern-day Tokyo. The descendants and reincarnations of the Slayers live peaceful, ordinary lives, free from the fear of the dark. The memory of the sacrifice is immortalized in old photographs and family stories, ensuring that the sunrise of peace lasts forever.

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: With the defeat of the progenitor... the mission of the Demon Slayer Corps is finally complete.
main_dialogue.tone: Solemn and steady, carrying the weight of a thousand-year-old struggle finally ending.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Slightly bowed head, eyes closed, solemn expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: As of this moment... the Demon Slayer Corps is officially disbanded. You have all done enough.
main_dialogue.tone: A heavy pause followed by a voice filled with relief and profound respect.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Neutral standing, hands at sides, stoic expression

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: To everyone who fought... to everyone we lost... thank you for allowing us to see this day.
main_dialogue.tone: Choked with emotion but vibrating with deep, sincere gratitude.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Deep bow of respect, hands pressed to thighs

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: It's over... Tanjiro. The sun is so warm now.
main_dialogue.tone: Soft, melodic, and full of wonder at a world no longer defined by fear.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing neutrally, hands folded in front, calm pink eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: And so, the blades were sheathed. The scars remained, but the night was no longer something to be feared. Time, relentless and kind, began to flow forward.
main_dialogue.tone: Warm and narrative, like a storybook closing its final chapter.

main_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
main_dialogue.text: Decades turned into a century. The world moved on, taller and brighter, fueled by a peace bought with the blood of the brave.
main_dialogue.tone: Transcendent and rhythmic, bridging the gap between eras.

main_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Hey! Wait up! We're going to be late for the opening ceremony!
main_dialogue.tone: The 'Vocal Smile': Bright, sunny, and explicitly inviting, full of youthful energy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Bright wide-eyed smile, looking directly at the viewer

main_dialogue.speaker: Zenitsu Agatsuma
main_dialogue.text: Don't run so fast! My heart can't take this much cardio in the morning!
main_dialogue.tone: Comically dramatic but genuinely happy, lacking the old notes of true terror.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Smiling brightly with closed eyes, hugging himself in a moment of joy

main_dialogue.speaker: Inosuke Hashibira
main_dialogue.text: Move aside! I'll be the first one through the school gates! I'm the king of the morning commute!
main_dialogue.tone: Boisterous and competitive, filled with unbridled confidence.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Mask removed, smirking confidently, holding both swords over shoulders with a cocky grin

main_dialogue.speaker: Nezuko Kamado
main_dialogue.text: Be careful, everyone! The crosswalk is still red!
main_dialogue.tone: Cheerful and caring, the voice of a sister watching over her friends.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Waving one hand enthusiastically, bright and cheerful eyes

main_dialogue.speaker: Giyu Tomioka
main_dialogue.text: Peace... it suits them well.
main_dialogue.tone: A soft whisper, barely audible, filled with a peaceful melancholy.
main_dialogue.character_pose_expression: A faint, barely visible smile, eyes softened, looking down

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Look at the old family photograph.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: On a shelf in a modern apartment, a faded photograph sits. It shows a group of young people with swords, smiling through their exhaustion.
branching_dialogue.tone: Quiet and reflective.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: My ancestors really had a lot of spirit, didn't they? I'll make sure to live my life to the fullest for them too.
branching_dialogue.tone: Determined and grateful, a promise kept across generations.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Standing neutrally, gentle smile, hands at sides

choices_and_branches.choice_text: Run toward the future with your friends.

branching_dialogue.speaker: Tanjiro Kamado
branching_dialogue.text: Come on, everyone! The sun is finally up, and we have the whole day ahead of us!
branching_dialogue.tone: Radiant and optimistic, looking toward the horizon.
branching_dialogue.character_pose_expression: Enthusiastic thumbs up, beaming smile

branching_dialogue.speaker: Narrator
branching_dialogue.text: They ran forward, their silhouettes merging with the vibrant light of the modern city, leaving the shadows of the past behind forever.
branching_dialogue.tone: Epic and concluding.

mid_scene_location_changes.visual_description: A vibrant, hyper-modern cityscape with massive digital billboards, towering glass buildings, and a sea of people in modern clothing crossing the street under a brilliant blue sky.

content.initial_location_description: A serene traditional Japanese courtyard bathed in the soft golden light of a setting sun. Wisteria petals drift slowly through the air, and the remaining members of the Demon Slayer Corps stand in a formal line.
content.initial_bgm: soft nostalgic piano and strings
